title: After the Kikuka Sho: Just Can't Hack It

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Huff, huff, huff... Aw, man, I lost... Ah, well.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
I can't believe it...
I was so sure I could win...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Long-distance races are my specialty. How could I
have lost control over my breathing?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
It must have been the weight of running my first
Classic Triple Crown race...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, I totally get that feeling. You can't run a
Triple Crown race like you would any other.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
I bet it happens to everyone, so don't beat
yourself up.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Do you think so? You may be right... but even so!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Sniff, sniffle... Ughhh...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: McQueen?!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
This is my own fault. I didn't prepare enough... No
matter the excuse, it's no consolation...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: I wanted to overcome any obstacle and win today... I just... wanted to... win here... Sob...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
(Oh, McQueen... I can't believe she wanted to win
that badly...)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: (I lost today too, same as her. But...)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
(Did I really wanna win so bad that I would've
cried if I didn't? I wonder...)

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: That night...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Hey, Trainer. I realized something after running in
the Kikuka Sho today.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
I really am built a little different than the other
Mejiros.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Like... I feel like I don't have the same passion for
racing. Or the same strength to dream big.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Ryan ran all of the Classic Triple Crown races with
a sense of duty to win every single one of them.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
And McQueen's attitude toward the race today
was really amazing...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Then there's me. All I was thinking about was
having fun.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
If you ask me if I was taking the race as seriously
as them, well... I can't really say I was.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: I like running, but...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: I don't know where exactly I should be running.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Aaanyway, that just popped into my head! It's not
like I'm seriously worried about where I belong or
whatever.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
That's enough of that! Oh, right, you gonna eat
that spicy pudding in the fridge? I've gotten
kinda addicted to it.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Palmer changes the subject and heads for
the refrigerator. It seems she hasn't decided how
she feels yet.
